title: Saw a cloud that looked like an Eva today
display_title: Saw a cloud that looked like an Eva today
wikitext:
[]: Saw a cloud that looked like an Eva today...             Quote Post by Pman » Fri May 07, 2010 6:10 pm Yes, I did. More importantly, has anyone seen things that look like an Eva, but weren't intended to be?

[]:             Quote Post by skikes » Fri May 07, 2010 6:25 pm Yes, I was looking at the bottom of a barrel and I swear I saw a bunch of little Eva geeks scrapping at it.

[]:             Quote Post by Vegeta 20XX » Fri May 07, 2010 6:35 pm This would be a good time to observe one of the unwritten Rules of the Mugen Fighters Guild: Pics or it didn't happen.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri May 07, 2010 7:35 pm Vegeta 20XX wrote: Also, wasn't there a topic devoted to this subject?

[]:             Quote Post by backseatjesus » Fri May 07, 2010 8:21 pm Killed a swan the other day.......did a shit on it.

[]:             Quote Post by skikes » Fri May 07, 2010 9:21 pm backseatjesus wrote: Killed a swan the other day.......did a shit on it.

[]: Re: Saw a cloud that looked like an Eva today...             Quote Post by esselfortium » Fri May 07, 2010 9:46 pm Pman wrote: Yes, I did. More importantly, has anyone seen things that look like an Eva, but weren't intended to be?

[]:             Quote Post by Lucretius » Fri May 07, 2010 9:49 pm I saw a speed bump that looked like Rei. I like speed bumps. ._.

[]:             Quote Post by backseatjesus » Fri May 07, 2010 10:30 pm skikes wrote: I've actually been laughing at this comment for like 10mins!

[]:             Quote Post by skikes » Sat May 08, 2010 8:20 am backseatjesus wrote: You get 10 points if you find out where I stole that line from.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat May 08, 2010 8:48 am Maybe it's time to link to this thread .

[]:             Quote Post by Vegeta 20XX » Sat May 08, 2010 1:24 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: Maybe it's time to link to this thread .

[]:             Quote Post by skikes » Sat May 08, 2010 3:41 pm I saw a cloud that looked like bardiel today.
